name: load-test
description: Load and Performance Tests using k6

scripts.test:metrics: docker run --rm -i --network realworld-network -e BASE_URL=http://backend:8080/api -e K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=http://prometheus:9090/api/v1/write -e K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS="p(90),p(95),p(99),max,min,avg" grafana/k6 run -o experimental-prometheus-rw --tag test_run=manual - < src/happy-path.ts
